summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of NASSAQ Scheduling Engine UI - Iteration 8. All 3 new pages (Time Slots, Teacher Assignments, Schedule) are working correctly with full RTL support, responsive design, and proper integration with backend APIs.

issues: Minor ESLint warnings about useEffect dependencies - not affecting functionality

passed_tests: Login flow - Successfully authenticates with admin credentials
Schedule Page - Loads with weekly grid showing 5 days (Sun-Thu)
Schedule Page - Displays sessions with color coding by subject
Schedule Page - Shows conflict indicators (red warning icons) on conflicting sessions
Schedule Page - Conflicts badge shows '2 تعارض' (2 conflicts)
Schedule Page - Conflicts sheet opens and shows teacher/class double booking details
Schedule Page - Session detail dialog opens on click with subject, teacher, class, time, day info
Schedule Page - Delete session button present in detail dialog
Schedule Page - Auto-generate button present
Schedule Page - Publish button present (disabled when conflicts exist)
Schedule Page - Filter by teacher dropdown works
Schedule Page - Filter by class dropdown works
Schedule Page - Create new schedule dialog works
Schedule Page - Links to Time Slots and Teacher Assignments in header
Time Slots Page - Loads with 11 time slots (9 periods + 2 breaks)
Time Slots Page - Each slot shows name, time range, duration badge
Time Slots Page - Break periods highlighted with amber background
Time Slots Page - Delete button for each slot
Time Slots Page - Add Time Slot dialog with all fields (name AR/EN, start/end time, duration, break toggle)
Time Slots Page - School select dropdown works
Teacher Assignments Page - Loads with summary stats (teachers, classes, subjects, assignments)
Teacher Assignments Page - Teacher cards show name, rank badge, assignment count
Teacher Assignments Page - Workload progress bar shows current/max sessions
Teacher Assignments Page - Rank dropdown allows changing teacher rank
Teacher Assignments Page - Assignment table shows class, subject, weekly sessions, semester
Teacher Assignments Page - Delete button for each assignment
Teacher Assignments Page - Add Assignment dialog with teacher, class, subject, weekly sessions, semester fields
Teacher Assignments Page - Search input works
Navigation - Sidebar link to 'الجدول المدرسي' (Schedule) works
Navigation - Direct URL navigation to all 3 pages works
Navigation - Back arrow from Time Slots/Assignments to Schedule works
RTL Support - All pages display correctly in RTL layout
RTL Support - Arabic text renders properly
Responsive Design - Mobile sidebar toggle works
Responsive Design - Time Slots page displays well on mobile
Responsive Design - Teacher Assignments page displays well on mobile
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
RTL layout is correctly implemented using Tailwind's RTL utilities
Color coding for subjects in schedule grid provides good visual distinction
Conflict highlighting with red borders and warning icons is clear and visible
Workload progress bar correctly shows underloaded (amber) vs normal (green) status
Teacher rank system with color-coded badges is well implemented
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 scheduling engine UI pages are fully functional. Schedule page shows weekly grid with sessions, conflicts, and filtering. Time Slots page shows 11 slots with CRUD operations. Teacher Assignments page shows teacher workload and assignments. All pages support RTL Arabic layout and are responsive on mobile. Backend APIs are all working correctly (verified in iteration_7).

time_slots_page.delete_slot: ✓ Working - Delete button on each slot

teacher_assignments_page.view_assignments_grouped_by_teacher: ✓ Working - Teacher cards with assignments table
teacher_assignments_page.view_teacher_workload_progress_bar: ✓ Working - Shows current/max with color coding
teacher_assignments_page.change_teacher_rank: ✓ Working - Dropdown in teacher card header

schedule_page.view_weekly_schedule_grid: ✓ Working - 5 days x time slots grid
schedule_page.click_session_to_see_details: ✓ Working - Dialog with full session info

navigation.links_between_pages: ✓ Working - Header links and back arrows

features_verified.rtl_support: ✓ Working - All pages support Arabic RTL layout
features_verified.responsive_design: ✓ Working - Mobile sidebar and layouts work
